content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Agent</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T14:26:43.887Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"description\":\"Analyze opencore.h header\",\"prompt\":\"深度分析 /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h 文件，特别关注：\\n- VirtualMemoryArea 结构体定义\\n- Opencore 基类设计\\n- Filter/Flag 常量定义\\n- 架构抽象方法\\n\\n提取类型定义和接口设计。\",\"subagent_type\":\"understand-anything:file-analyzer\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"status\":\"completed\",\"prompt\":\"深度分析 /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h 文件，特别关注：\\n- VirtualMemoryArea 结构体定义\\n- Opencore 基类设计\\n- Filter/Flag 常量定义\\n- 架构抽象方法\\n\\n提取类型定义和接口设计。\",\"agentId\":\"af929e33dbe706fc9\",\"agentType\":\"understand-anything:file-analyzer\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"\\n\\n## OpenCore SDK 核心头文件深度分析\\n\\n### 1. VirtualMemoryArea 结构体定义\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct VirtualMemoryArea {\\n    uint64_t begin;      // VMA 起始地址\\n    uint64_t end;        // VMA 结束地址\\n    char     flags[4];   // 权限标志 (r/w/x/s/p)\\n    uint32_t offset;     // 文件偏移 (如果映射自文件)\\n    uint32_t major;      // 设备号主编号\\n    uint32_t minor;      // 设备号次编号\\n    uint64_t inode;      // inode 号\\n    std::string file;    // 文件路径\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**设计特点**：\\n- 封装 Linux 进程地址空间中的一个内存区域\\n- `flags[4]` 使用固定字符数组而非 bitmask，兼容 `/proc/PID/maps` 输出格式\\n- `file` 字段使用 `std::string` 动态存储路径，简化内存管理\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 2. Opencore 基类设计\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (基类)\\n├── 静态成员\\n│   ├── GetInstance()      → 单例获取\\n│   ├── HandleSignal()     → 信号处理入口\\n│   └── GetVersion()       → 版本查询\\n├── 虚拟方法 (模板方法模式)\\n│   ├── Finish()            → 清理资源\\n│   ├── DoCoredump()        → 执行 core dump (默认返回 false)\\n│   ├── NeedFilterFile()    → VMA 过滤决策\\n│   └── getMachine()        → 机器类型\\n├── 实例方法\\n│   ├── Setter/Getter      → 配置读写\\n│   ├── Coredump()         → 主流程\\n│   ├── StopTheWorld/Thread → 进程/线程控制\\n│   └── ParseMaps()        → 解析 /proc/PID/maps\\n└── 嵌套类\\n    └── DumpOption         → Dump 参数封装\\n```\\n\\n**关键设计模式**：\\n- **模板方法模式**：`Coredump()` 调用 `DoCoredump()`，子类实现具体逻辑\\n- **策略模式**：`NeedFilterFile()` 允许子类自定义过滤策略\\n- **单例模式**：`GetInstance()` 获取全局唯一实例\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 3. Filter / Flag 常量定义\\n\\n| 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|------|-----|------|\\n| **FLAG_CORE** | `1 << 0` | 包含 core 文件头 |\\n| **FLAG_PROCESS_COMM** | `1 << 1` | 包含进程 comm |\\n| **FLAG_PID** | `1 << 2` | 包含 PID |\\n| **FLAG_THREAD_COMM** | `1 << 3` | 包含线程 comm |\\n| **FLAG_TID** | `1 << 4` | 包含 TID |\\n| **FLAG_TIMESTAMP** | `1 << 5` | 包含时间戳 |\\n| **FLAG_ALL** | 组合 | 全部标志 |\\n\\n| 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|------|-----|------|\\n| **FILTER_NONE** | `0x0` | 不过滤 |\\n| **FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA** | `1 << 0` | 过滤特殊 VMA |\\n| **FILTER_FILE_VMA** | `1 << 1` | 过滤文件映射 |\\n| **FILTER_SHARED_VMA** | `1 << 2` | 过滤共享映射 |\\n| **FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA** | `1 << 3` | 过滤 sanitizer 影子内存 |\\n| **FILTER_NON_READ_VMA** | `1 << 4` | 过滤不可读 VMA |\\n| **FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT** | `1 << 5` | 过滤信号上下文 |\\n| **FILTER_MINIDUMP** | `1 << 6` | minidump 模式 |\\n| **FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA** | `1 << 7` | 过滤 Java Heap |\\n| **FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA** | `1 << 8` | 过滤 JIT Cache |\\n\\n| VMA 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|----------|-----|------|\\n| **VMA_NORMAL** | `0` | 正常 VMA |\\n| **VMA_NULL** | `1 << 0` | 空 VMA |\\n| **VMA_INCLUDE** | `1 << 1` | 强制包含 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 4. 架构抽象方法\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 模板方法：子类实现核心逻辑\\nvirtual void Finish();                                    // 清理资源\\nvirtual bool DoCoredump(const char* filename) { return false; }  // 核心 dump 逻辑\\nvirtual int NeedFilterFile(Opencore::VirtualMemoryArea& vma);      // VMA 过滤决策\\nvirtual int getMachine() { return EM_NONE; }             // 架构类型\\n```\\n\\n**DoCoredump 返回值语义**：\\n- `false` → 基类不执行实际操作，子类实现（如 `opencore.cpp` 中可能有具体派生类）\\n- 若返回 `true` → 表示已处理，调用者跳过默认逻辑\\n\\n**NeedFilterFile 返回值语义**：\\n- `VMA_NORMAL` (0) → 正常处理\\n- `VMA_NULL` → 跳过此 VMA\\n- `VMA_INCLUDE` → 强制包含（即使被 filter 匹配）\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 5. ELF 架构常量\\n\\n```cpp\\n#define EM_NONE     0    // 无架构\\n#define EM_386      3    // x86\\n#define EM_ARM      40   // ARM\\n#define EM_X86_64   62   // x86-64\\n#define EM_AARCH64  183  // ARM64\\n#define EM_RISCV    243  // RISC-V\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 总结\\n\\n| 维度 | 评估 |\\n|------|------|\\n| **设计模式** | 模板方法 + 单例 + 策略模式 |\\n| **扩展性** | 通过虚函数支持子类定制 DoCoredump/NeedFilterFile |\\n| **配置粒度** | Flag 控制输出内容，Filter 控制 VMA 过滤 |\\n| **线程安全** | `StopTheWorld/StopTheThread/Continue` 支持多线程控制 |\"}],\"totalDurationMs\":46931,\"totalTokens\":84820,\"totalToolUseCount\":1,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6526,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":0,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":76916,\"output_tokens\":1378,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"},\"toolStats\":{\"readCount\":1,\"searchCount\":0,\"bashCount\":0,\"editFileCount\":0,\"linesAdded\":0,\"linesRemoved\":0,\"otherToolCount\":0}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Return either one or more <observation>...</observation> blocks, or an empty response if this tool use should be skipped.
Concrete debugging findings from logs, queue state, database rows, session routing, or code-path inspection count as durable discoveries and should be recorded.
Never reply with prose such as "Skipping", "No substantive tool executions", or any explanation outside XML. Non-XML text is discarded.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <outcome>"{\"status\":\"completed\",\"prompt\":\"深度分析 /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h 文件，特别关注：\\n- VirtualMemoryArea 结构体定义\\n- Opencore 基类设计\\n- Filter/Flag 常量定义\\n- 架构抽象方法\\n\\n提取类型定义和接口设计。\",\"agentId\":\"af929e33dbe706fc9\",\"agentType\":\"understand-anything:file-analyzer\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"\\n\\n## OpenCore SDK 核心头文件深度分析\\n\\n### 1. VirtualMemoryArea 结构体定义\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct VirtualMemoryArea {\\n    uint64_t begin;      // VMA 起始地址\\n    uint64_t end;        // VMA 结束地址\\n    char     flags[4];   // 权限标志 (r/w/x/s/p)\\n    uint32_t offset;     // 文件偏移 (如果映射自文件)\\n    uint32_t major;      // 设备号主编号\\n    uint32_t minor;      // 设备号次编号\\n    uint64_t inode;      // inode 号\\n    std::string file;    // 文件路径\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**设计特点**：\\n- 封装 Linux 进程地址空间中的一个内存区域\\n- `flags[4]` 使用固定字符数组而非 bitmask，兼容 `/proc/PID/maps` 输出格式\\n- `file` 字段使用 `std::string` 动态存储路径，简化内存管理\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 2. Opencore 基类设计\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (基类)\\n├── 静态成员\\n│   ├── GetInstance()      → 单例获取\\n│   ├── HandleSignal()     → 信号处理入口\\n│   └── GetVersion()       → 版本查询\\n├── 虚拟方法 (模板方法模式)\\n│   ├── Finish()            → 清理资源\\n│   ├── DoCoredump()        → 执行 core dump (默认返回 false)\\n│   ├── NeedFilterFile()    → VMA 过滤决策\\n│   └── getMachine()        → 机器类型\\n├── 实例方法\\n│   ├── Setter/Getter      → 配置读写\\n│   ├── Coredump()         → 主流程\\n│   ├── StopTheWorld/Thread → 进程/线程控制\\n│   └── ParseMaps()        → 解析 /proc/PID/maps\\n└── 嵌套类\\n    └── DumpOption         → Dump 参数封装\\n```\\n\\n**关键设计模式**：\\n- **模板方法模式**：`Coredump()` 调用 `DoCoredump()`，子类实现具体逻辑\\n- **策略模式**：`NeedFilterFile()` 允许子类自定义过滤策略\\n- **单例模式**：`GetInstance()` 获取全局唯一实例\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 3. Filter / Flag 常量定义\\n\\n| 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|------|-----|------|\\n| **FLAG_CORE** | `1 << 0` | 包含 core 文件头 |\\n| **FLAG_PROCESS_COMM** | `1 << 1` | 包含进程 comm |\\n| **FLAG_PID** | `1 << 2` | 包含 PID |\\n| **FLAG_THREAD_COMM** | `1 << 3` | 包含线程 comm |\\n| **FLAG_TID** | `1 << 4` | 包含 TID |\\n| **FLAG_TIMESTAMP** | `1 << 5` | 包含时间戳 |\\n| **FLAG_ALL** | 组合 | 全部标志 |\\n\\n| 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|------|-----|------|\\n| **FILTER_NONE** | `0x0` | 不过滤 |\\n| **FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA** | `1 << 0` | 过滤特殊 VMA |\\n| **FILTER_FILE_VMA** | `1 << 1` | 过滤文件映射 |\\n| **FILTER_SHARED_VMA** | `1 << 2` | 过滤共享映射 |\\n| **FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA** | `1 << 3` | 过滤 sanitizer 影子内存 |\\n| **FILTER_NON_READ_VMA** | `1 << 4` | 过滤不可读 VMA |\\n| **FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT** | `1 << 5` | 过滤信号上下文 |\\n| **FILTER_MINIDUMP** | `1 << 6` | minidump 模式 |\\n| **FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA** | `1 << 7` | 过滤 Java Heap |\\n| **FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA** | `1 << 8` | 过滤 JIT Cache |\\n\\n| VMA 常量 | 值 | 用途 |\\n|----------|-----|------|\\n| **VMA_NORMAL** | `0` | 正常 VMA |\\n| **VMA_NULL** | `1 << 0` | 空 VMA |\\n| **VMA_INCLUDE** | `1 << 1` | 强制包含 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 4. 架构抽象方法\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 模板方法：子类实现核心逻辑\\nvirtual void Finish();                                    // 清理资源\\nvirtual bool DoCoredump(const char* filename) { return false; }  // 核心 dump 逻辑\\nvirtual int NeedFilterFile(Opencore::VirtualMemoryArea& vma);      // VMA 过滤决策\\nvirtual int getMachine() { return EM_NONE; }             // 架构类型\\n```\\n\\n**DoCoredump 返回值语义**：\\n- `false` → 基类不执行实际操作，子类实现（如 `opencore.cpp` 中可能有具体派生类）\\n- 若返回 `true` → 表示已处理，调用者跳过默认逻辑\\n\\n**NeedFilterFile 返回值语义**：\\n- `VMA_NORMAL` (0) → 正常处理\\n- `VMA_NULL` → 跳过此 VMA\\n- `VMA_INCLUDE` → 强制包含（即使被 filter 匹配）\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 5. ELF 架构常量\\n\\n```cpp\\n#define EM_NONE     0    // 无架构\\n#define EM_386      3    // x86\\n#define EM_ARM      40   // ARM\\n#define EM_X86_64   62   // x86-64\\n#define EM_AARCH64  183  // ARM64\\n#define EM_RISCV    243  // RISC-V\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 总结\\n\\n| 维度 | 评估 |\\n|------|------|\\n| **设计模式** | 模板方法 + 单例 + 策略模式 |\\n| **扩展性** | 通过虚函数支持子类定制 DoCoredump/NeedFilterFile |\\n| **配置粒度** | Flag 控制输出内容，Filter 控制 VMA 过滤 |\\n| **线程安全** | `StopTheWorld/StopTheThread/Continue` 支持多线程控制 |\"}],\"totalDurationMs\":46931,\"totalTokens\":84820,\"totalToolUseCount\":1,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6526,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":0,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":76916,\"output_tokens\":1378,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"},\"toolStats\":{\"readCount\":1,\"searchCount\":0,\"bashCount\":0,\"editFileCount\":0,\"linesAdded\":0,\"linesRemoved\":0,\"otherToolCount\":0}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

JNI 函数导出 (JNINativeMethod)\\n\\n### 1.1 注册机制\\n\\n`gMethods[]` 数组定义在 **lines 122-188**，包含 **12 个 JNI native 方法**：\\n\\n| Java 方法 | Signature | Native 实现 |\\n|-----------|-----------|-------------|\\n| `nativeVersion` | `()Ljava/lang/String;` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeVersion` |\\n| `nativeEnable` | `()Z` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeEnable` |\\n| `nativeDisable` | `()Z` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeDisable` |\\n| `nativeCoredump` | `(ILjava/lang/String;)Z` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeCoredump` |\\n| `nativeSetDir` | `(Ljava/lang/String;)V` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeSetDir` |\\n| `nativeSetFlag` | `(I)V` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeSetFlag` |\\n| `nativeSetTimeout` | `(I)V` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeSetTimeout` |\\n| `nativeSetFilter` | `(I)V` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeSetFilter` |\\n| `nativeIsEnabled` | `()Z` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeIsEnabled` |\\n| `nativeGetDir` | `()Ljava/lang/String;` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeGetDir` |\\n| `nativeGetFlag` | `()I` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeGetFlag` |\\n| `nativeGetFilter` | `()I` | `penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeGetFilter` |\\n\\n### 1.2 初始化入口 (lines 192-201)\\n\\n```cpp\\nJava_penguin_opencore_sdk_Coredump_nativeInit(JNIEnv* env, jclass clazz) {\\n    gUser.gCoredump = (jclass)env->NewGlobalRef(clazz);  // 保存全局引用\\n    env->RegisterNatives(gUser.gCoredump, gMethods, ...); // 注册 native 方法\\n    gUser.gCallbackEvent = env->GetStaticMethodID(..., \\\"callbackEvent\\\", \\\"(Ljava/lang/String;)V\\\");\\n    Opencore::SetCallback(penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback); // 设置回调\\n    return true;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n关键点：初始化时同时完成 **native 方法注册** 和 **回调方法 ID 获取**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. Java 回调机制\\n\\n### 2.1 数据结构 (lines 31-34)\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct userdata {\\n    jclass gCoredump;       // 全局引用 Java 类\\n    jmethodID gCallbackEvent; // 回调方法 ID\\n};\\nstatic userdata gUser;       // 全局单例\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 回调流程\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (C++)  →  penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback  →  createJavaThread\\n                                                                   ↓\\nJava 层 ← CallStaticVoidMethod ← penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_docallback\\n```\\n\\n**两步异步模式** (lines 38-54):\\n\\n1. **外层回调** `penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback`:\\n   - 调用 `android::AndroidJNI::createJavaThread()` 创建 Java 线程\\n   - 传入内层函数 `penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_docallback` 和 filepath\\n\\n2. **内层回调** `penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_docallback`:\\n   - 通过 `android::AndroidJNI::getJNIEnv()` 获取 JNIEnv\\n   - 调用 `env->CallStaticVoidMethod(gUser.gCoredump, gUser.gCallbackEvent, filepath)`\\n\\n### 2.3 为什么用 pthread_join?\\n\\n```cpp\\npthread_t thread = ... createJavaThread(...);\\nif (thread) pthread_join(thread, NULL);  // 等待线程完成\\n```\\n\\n这是为了**同步等待 Java 层回调完成**，确保 coredump 事件被处理后再返回。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Inject 模式实现\\n\\n### 3.1 编译时条件编译 (lines 219-246)\\n\\n```cpp\\n#if defined(INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR)\\nextern \\\"C\\\"\\nvoid __attribute__((constructor)) opencore_ctor_init() {\\n    // 库加载时自动执行\\n    Opencore::SetDir(INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR);\\n    Opencore::SetTimeout(180);\\n    Opencore::SetFlag(Opencore::FLAG_CORE | ...);\\n    Opencore::SetFilter(Opencore::FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | ...);\\n    Opencore::Enable();\\n}\\n#endif\\n```\\n\\n### 3.2 使用方式\\n\\n```bash\\n# 定义宏后编译\\n#define INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR \\\"/sdcard/Android/data/penguin.opencore.sdk/files\\\"\\n\\n# 远程注入\\ncore-parser> remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so\\n```\\n\\n### 3.3 注入场景\\n\\n用于 **Zygote 集成** —— 通过 LD_PRELOAD 将 `libopencore.so` 注入到 zygote 进程，无需修改目标 App 代码即可启用 crash 处理。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 与 Native Core 的交互\\n\\n### 4.1 交互接口映射\\n\\n| Java API | Native Core API | 用途 |\\n|----------|-----------------|------|\\n| `nativeEnable/Disable` | `Opencore::Enable/Disable()` | 开关控制 |\\n| `nativeCoredump(tid, file)` | `Opencore::Dump(cstr, tid)` | 触发 dump |\\n| `nativeSetDir(dir)` | `Opencore::SetDir(cstr)` | 设置输出目录 |\\n| `nativeSetFlag(flag)` | `Opencore::SetFlag(flag)` | 设置标志位 |\\n| `nativeSetTimeout(sec)` | `Opencore::SetTimeout(sec)` | 设置超时 |\\n| `nativeSetFilter(filter)` | `Opencore::SetFilter(filter)` | 设置过滤器 |\\n| `nativeVersion` | `Opencore::GetVersion()` | 获取版本 |\\n\\n### 4.2 回调注册 (line 199)\\n\\n```cpp\\nOpencore::SetCallback(penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback);\\n```\\n\\nNative Core 在检测到 crash 时调用此回调，回调再通过 Java 线程调用 Java 层 `Coredump.callbackEvent(String)`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 架构图\\n\\n```\\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\n│                         Java Layer                              │\\n│  Coredump.callbackEvent(String path)                            │\\n└───────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘\\n                            │ CallStaticVoidMethod\\n┌───────────────────────────▼───────────────────────────────────┐\\n│                    JNI Bridge (opencore_jni.cpp)                │\\n│  ┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐  │\\n│  │ penguin_opencore│    │  gMethods[]  (12 native methods)  │  │\\n│  │ _sdk_coredump   │    └──────────────────────────────────┘  │\\n│  │ _callback      │                                            │\\n│  └───────┬────────┘                                            │\\n│          │ createJavaThread + pthread_join                      │\\n│  ┌───────▼─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │\\n│  │ penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_docallback                 │   │\\n│  └───────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │\\n└──────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\\n           │ JNI Call\\n┌──────────▼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\n│                      Native Core (libopencore.so)                │\\n│  Opencore::Enable/Disable/Dump/SetCallback/SetDir/SetFlag...   │\\n│                                                                  │\\n│  ┌──────────────────────┐    ┌───────────────────────────────┐  │\\n│  │ crash detector       │───▶│ penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump │  │\\n│  │                      │    │ _callback(filepath)            │  │\\n│  └──────────────────────┘    └───────────────────────────────┘  │\\n└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 关键设计模式总结\\n\\n| 特性 | 实现方式 |\\n|------|----------|\\n| **Native 方法分发** | `JNINativeMethod[]` + `RegisterNatives` |\\n| **全局状态存储** | `static userdata gUser` + `NewGlobalRef` |\\n| **异步 Java 回调** | `createJavaThread` + `pthread_join` 同步等待 |\\n| **Inject 模式** | `__attribute__((constructor))` 自动初始化 |\\n| **跨层调用** | Java → JNI → Opencore C++; C++ → 回调 → Java |\"}],\"totalDurationMs\":59685,\"totalTokens\":87139,\"totalToolUseCount\":1,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":2706,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":0,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":81856,\"output_tokens\":2577,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"},\"toolStats\":{\"readCount\":1,\"searchCount\":0,\"bashCount\":0,\"editFileCount\":0,\"linesAdded\":0,\"linesRemoved\":0,\"otherToolCount\":0}}"</outcome>

Opencore::SetDir(INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR);\\n    Opencore::SetTimeout(180);\\n    Opencore::SetFlag(Opencore::FLAG_CORE | ...);\\n    Opencore::SetFilter(Opencore::FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | ...);\\n    Opencore::Enable();\\n}\\n#endif\\n```\\n\\n### 3.2 使用方式\\n\\n```bash\\n# 定义宏后编译\\n#define INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR \\\"/sdcard/Android/data/penguin.opencore.sdk/files\\\"\\n\\n# 远程注入\\ncore-parser> remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so\\n```\\n\\n### 3.3 注入场景\\n\\n用于 **Zygote 集成** —— 通过 LD_PRELOAD 将 `libopencore.so` 注入到 zygote 进程，无需修改目标 App 代码即可启用 crash 处理。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 与 Native Core 的交互\\n\\n### 4.1 交互接口映射\\n\\n| Java API | Native Core API | 用途 |\\n|----------|-----------------|------|\\n| `nativeEnable/Disable` | `Opencore::Enable/Disable()` | 开关控制 |\\n| `nativeCoredump(tid, file)` | `Opencore::Dump(cstr, tid)` | 触发 dump |\\n| `nativeSetDir(dir)` | `Opencore::SetDir(cstr)` | 设置输出目录 |\\n| `nativeSetFlag(flag)` | `Opencore::SetFlag(flag)` | 设置标志位 |\\n| 4.2 回调注册 (line 199)\\n\\n```cpp\\nOpencore::SetCallback(penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback);\\n```\\n\\nNative Core 在检测到 crash 时调用此回调，回调再通过 Java 线程调用 Java 层
